# ByteCast Handoff — 2026-07-07 (EOD pause)

**Session focus:** Shipping intake integration + Shareholder Season 1 side lane completion.  
**Repo:** `\\100.115.9.61\Collab\mini.shops\bytecast`  
**Plan reference:** `bytecast_intake_integration` (do not edit the plan file itself)

---

## Executive summary

ByteCast now has a **publishable Shareholder Season 1 side lane** (`S1-EP-01` … `S1-EP-06`) that is visible in Playlist and Training Hub but **not** on the Golden Path (`p1_golden_path`). Shipping-intake artifacts were promoted into canonical docs/schemas/shared paths. Teaching modes were documented content-first (not forced Listen→Engage→Do everywhere).

Tonight's final pass added **canonical episode packs** under `episodes/shareholder_s1_ep01/` … `shareholder_s1_ep06/` so Playlist links work correctly (previously pointed at broken `bytecast-ep01.html/index.html` URLs).

## Critical constraint (do not break)

Two **parallel episode numbering systems**:

| Track | Codes | Location | Topics |
|-------|-------|----------|--------|
| **Core Day 1** | `EP-001` … `EP-004` | `episodes/welcome_to_bytecast/` etc. | Onboarding spine → TR-001A |
| **Shareholder Season 1** | `S1-EP-01` … `S1-EP-06` | `episodes/shareholder_s1_ep0X/` → legacy root HTML | Briefing series (different topics) |

**`S1-EP-04` (Portable Ecosystem) ≠ `EP-004` (Current Truth Basics).** Never merge or renumber blindly.

| `bytecast-ep01.html` | `EP01.aac` |
| `bytecast-ep02.html` | `EP02.aac` |

| `bytecast-ep04.html` | `ep04.mp3` |
| `bytecast-ep05.html` | `ep05.mp3` |
| `bytecast-ep06.html` | `ep06.mp3` |

**Next step:** Search `\\100.115.9.61\Collab\av-share\_SHIPPING-RECEIVING` (OUTBOX/INBOX) for these files; copy to bytecast root or `assets/shareholder_season1/` and update player `<source>` tags + profiles.

### 2. Playwright Golden Path (pre-existing flake)

`npm run test:golden-path` — **4 passed, 1 failed** (2026-07-06):

- Failure: EP-001 `#audio` visibility timeout in `waitForAudioReady` (element exists but `aria-hidden="true"`).
- Unrelated to Season 1 intake; fix when touching Day 1 listen mode or test helpers.

**Run tests on Windows UNC share:**

```bat
cmd /c "pushd \\100.115.9.61\Collab\mini.shops\bytecast && npm run test:golden-path && popd"
```

### 3. Deferred (per plan — not started)

- **Content archaeology:** Shipping `INBOX/Documents/EP01_*.md`, `EP02_*.md` vs `docs/day1/EP-001_VOICEOVER.md` etc.
- **Full pack migration:** Move legacy root HTML into `episodes/shareholder_s1_ep0X/` (no redirect) when audio + slides are stable.
- **Generator convergence:** Multiple paths under `full_seed_starter/` — keep one blessed profiles generator.

### 4. Related repo (The Signal)

Signal shipping-intake archive was created locally under `thesignal/archive/shipping-intake/` — **not deployed** to GitHub in this session. ByteCast status player and Internal Signals hub were deployed earlier in the week.
